headline: Counter-Terrorism Unit Arrests 120 Suspects in 2025
context: Special Branch arrested 120 terrorism suspects in 2025 including 15 linked to ISIS remnants in Southeast Asia.

cards.big: 120 terrorism suspects arrested in 2025 including 15 with ISIS links
cards.sub: Malaysia remains target for recruitment and transit for regional extremists

cards.big: 45 arrests involved online radicalization through encrypted messaging
cards.sub: Youngest suspect was 16 recruited through gaming community channels

cards.big: Special Branch disrupted 4 planned attacks including 1 targeting KLCC
cards.sub: Suspects acquired materials and conducted surveillance of target location

cards.big: Malaysia spent RM680 million on counter-terrorism operations in 2025
cards.sub: Deradicalization programme processed 480 individuals with 12% recidivism

cards.big: Counter-terrorism tests whether prevention and deradicalization receive equal focus as enforcement
120 counter-terrorism arrests in 2025. Prevention succeeds invisibly; failure is catastrophically visible.
